title: NLUO CMN launches NLUO Mediation Blogs
description: NLUO Centre for Mediation and Negotiation (NLUO CMN) has formally inaugurated NLUO Mediation Blogs on April 3, 2026 during the 3rd National Negotiation Competition, 2026 .The inauguration ceremony was graced by Vice-Chancellor (I/C), NLUO, Prof (Dr) Rangin Pallav Tripathy alongside Dean, Academics, Prof Dr Dolly Jabal and Co-Director, NLUO CMN Dr Akshay Verma. The ceremony saw participation from students representing various universities and colleges across India, alongside active engagement fro
